title: Promulgation and enforcement of rules and regulations
doc_html:
§628.  Promulgation and enforcement of rules and regulations

The department shall have authority to promulgate and enforce such rules and regulations as are necessary to carry out the provisions of this Part.

Acts 1958, No. 279, §8.
